<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Professional Cleaning, Pest Control &amp; Hygiene Management in Limpopo | Mosadia Mmakgonthe</title>
<meta name="description" content="Mosadia Mmakgonthe is a Polokwane-based cleaning company and pest control services provider offering commercial cleaning, office cleaning, deep cleaning, termite control, fumigation and hygiene management services across Limpopo.">
<meta name="keywords" content="professional cleaning services, commercial cleaning services, residential cleaning services, office cleaning services, deep cleaning services, industrial cleaning services, cleaning company Limpopo, cleaning contractors, pest control services, professional pest control, termite control, rodent control, fumigation services, hygiene management services, Limpopo">
<link rel="canonical" href="https://www.mosadiammakgonthe.co.za/">
<meta name="robots" content="index, follow">

<meta property="og:type" content="website">
<meta property="og:title" content="Professional Cleaning, Pest Control &amp; Hygiene Management in Limpopo | Mosadia Mmakgonthe">
<meta property="og:description" content="Commercial, residential and industrial cleaning, pest control and hygiene management services based in Polokwane, serving clients across Limpopo.">
<meta property="og:url" content="https://www.mosadiammakgonthe.co.za/">
<meta property="og:image" content="https://www.mosadiammakgonthe.co.za/data:image/jpeg;base64,">
<meta property="og:locale" content="en_ZA">
<meta name="theme-color" content="#3f8f1f">
<link rel="icon" type="image/png" href="data:image/png;base64,">
<link rel="apple-touch-icon" href="data:image/png;base64,">

<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>/* ============================================
   Mosadia Mmakgonthe — shared minimalist styles
   ============================================ */
:root{
  --paper:#faf9f6;
  --ink:#1c1a15;
  --ink-soft:#68655b;
  --line:#e4e0d3;
  --green:#3f8f1f;
  --green-dark:#295c14;
}
*{box-sizing:border-box; margin:0; padding:0;}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth;}
body{
  font-family:'Inter', -apple-system, sans-serif; color:var(--ink); background:var(--paper);
  -webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased; line-height:1.55; font-weight:400;
}
img{display:block; max-width:100%;}
a{color:inherit; text-decoration:none;}
ul{list-style:none;}
.wrap{max-width:1080px; margin:0 auto; padding:0 28px;}
section{padding:88px 0;}
@media(max-width:640px){ section{padding:56px 0;} .wrap{padding:0 20px;} }

.skip-link{position:absolute; left:-999px; top:0; background:var(--green); color:#fff; padding:10px 16px; z-index:100;}
.skip-link:focus{left:12px; top:12px;}

h1,h2,h3,h4{font-weight:500; line-height:1.15; letter-spacing:-0.01em;}
h1{font-size:clamp(2.1rem,4.6vw,3.1rem); font-weight:400;}
h2{font-size:clamp(1.7rem,3.2vw,2.3rem); font-weight:400;}
h3{font-size:1.12rem; font-weight:600;}
p{color:var(--ink-soft);}
.lede{font-size:1.05rem; line-height:1.75; max-width:680px; color:var(--ink-soft);}

.kicker{
  font-size:0.74rem; letter-spacing:0.14em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--green-dark);
  font-weight:600; margin-bottom:16px; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px;
}
.kicker::before{content:''; width:20px; height:1px; background:var(--green);}

/* ---------- NAV ---------- */
header.site-header{
  position:sticky; top:0; z-index:50; background:rgba(250,249,246,0.96);
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);
}
.nav-inner{display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; padding:16px 0;}
.brand{display:flex; align-items:center; gap:12px;}
.brand img{height:40px; width:auto;}
.brand-text{line-height:1.2;}
.brand-text .name{font-size:0.98rem; font-weight:600;}
.brand-text .tag{font-size:0.66rem; color:var(--green-dark); letter-spacing:0.03em;}
nav.navlinks{display:flex; align-items:center; gap:30px; font-size:0.86rem; font-weight:500;}
nav.navlinks a{color:var(--ink-soft); transition:color .2s; padding-bottom:2px; border-bottom:1px solid transparent;}
nav.navlinks a:hover, nav.navlinks a:focus-visible, nav.navlinks a[aria-current="page"]{color:var(--ink); border-color:var(--green);}
@media(max-width:860px){ nav.navlinks{display:none;} }

.btn{
  display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; background:var(--ink); color:#fff;
  padding:11px 22px; font-size:0.84rem; font-weight:600; border-radius:2px;
  transition:background .2s;
}
.btn:hover, .btn:focus-visible{background:var(--green-dark);}
.arrow-link{border-bottom:1px solid var(--ink); padding-bottom:2px; font-size:0.9rem; font-weight:500; transition:opacity .2s, border-color .2s;}
.arrow-link:hover, .arrow-link:focus-visible{opacity:0.6;}

/* ---------- HOME HERO (vibrant, photo-led) ---------- */
.home-header{position:sticky; top:0; z-index:50; background:#fff; border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);}
.home-nav{display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; padding:16px 28px; max-width:1320px; margin:0 auto;}
.home-nav .brand img{height:44px;}
.home-nav .navlinks{display:flex; gap:32px; font-size:0.92rem; font-weight:600; color:#2a2a2a;}
.home-nav .navlinks a{transition:color .2s;}
.home-nav .navlinks a:hover{color:var(--green);}
.home-nav .nav-right{display:flex; align-items:center; gap:18px;}
.pill-phone{
  background:var(--green); color:#fff; font-weight:700; font-size:0.9rem;
  padding:11px 22px; border-radius:100px; display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:8px;
  transition:background .2s, transform .2s;
}
.pill-phone:hover{background:var(--green-dark); transform:translateY(-1px);}
.social-mini{display:flex; gap:12px;}
.social-mini a{width:30px; height:30px; border-radius:50%; background:#f0f2ea; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; color:var(--green-dark); transition:background .2s;}
.social-mini a:hover{background:var(--green); color:#fff;}
@media(max-width:900px){ .home-nav .navlinks{display:none;} }

.hero-photo-wrap{position:relative; overflow:hidden;}
.hero-photo-frame{
  position:relative; min-height:640px; display:flex; align-items:flex-end;
  background:
    linear-gradient(0deg, rgba(15,25,10,0.72) 0%, rgba(15,25,10,0.28) 42%, rgba(15,25,10,0.05) 65%),
    linear-gradient(120deg, #2c5a1a 0%, #3f8f1f 45%, #7fc24a 100%);
}
.hero-photo-frame::after{
  content:''; position:absolute; inset:0;
  background-image:
    radial-gradient(circle at 15% 20%, rgba(255,255,255,0.10), transparent 40%),
    radial-gradient(circle at 85% 30%, rgba(255,255,255,0.08), transparent 45%);
}
.hero-photo-content{position:relative; z-index:2; width:100%; padding:64px 28px 54px; max-width:1320px; margin:0 auto;}
.hero-estimate-pill{
  display:inline-block; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.6); color:#fff; font-size:0.86rem; font-weight:600;
  padding:11px 24px; border-radius:100px; margin-bottom:28px; backdrop-filter:blur(3px); transition:background .2s;
}
.hero-estimate-pill:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.15);}
h1.hero-big{
  color:#fff; font-size:clamp(2.6rem, 6vw, 4.6rem); font-weight:700; line-height:1.02; letter-spacing:-0.01em;
  text-shadow:0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.25);
}
h1.hero-big em{font-style:normal; color:#c9f26c;}
.hero-photo-content .lede{color:#f2f4ea; max-width:560px; margin-top:20px; font-size:1.08rem;}
.hero-cta-row{margin-top:32px; display:flex; gap:18px; flex-wrap:wrap;}
.btn-lime{
  background:#c9f26c; color:#1c2b12; font-weight:700; padding:14px 30px; border-radius:100px; font-size:0.94rem;
  transition:transform .2s, background .2s;
}
.btn-lime:hover{background:#fff; transform:translateY(-2px);}
.btn-ghost-white{
  border:1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.7); color:#fff; font-weight:600; padding:13px 28px; border-radius:100px; font-size:0.94rem;
  transition:background .2s;
}
.btn-ghost-white:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.12);}

.county-band{
  background:#c9f26c; color:#1c2b12; padding:20px 28px; text-align:center;
  font-size:1.15rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:0.01em;
}

.chat-bubble{
  position:fixed; right:24px; bottom:24px; z-index:60; background:#1c1a15; color:#fff;
  padding:14px 22px; border-radius:100px; font-weight:600; font-size:0.88rem; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px;
  box-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.25); transition:transform .2s;
}
.chat-bubble:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);}

/* photo-style panels (stand-in for real photography) */
.photo-panel{
  position:relative; aspect-ratio:4/3; border-radius:18px; overflow:hidden;
  display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
}
.photo-panel svg{width:34%; height:34%; opacity:0.92;}
.photo-panel .panel-label{
  position:absolute; left:16px; bottom:14px; color:#fff; font-size:0.78rem; font-weight:600; letter-spacing:0.02em;
}
.ppa{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#3f8f1f,#7fc24a);}
.ppb{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1c3d10,#3f8f1f);}
.ppc{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#295c14,#8fd457);}
.ppd{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0f2a08,#2c5a1a);}
.ppe{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#4fa825,#c9f26c);}
.ppf{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#295c14,#4fa825);}

.vibrant-cards{display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr); gap:26px;}
@media(max-width:860px){ .vibrant-cards{grid-template-columns:1fr;} }
.vcard{background:#fff; border:1px solid var(--line); border-radius:20px; overflow:hidden; transition:transform .25s, box-shadow .25s;}
.vcard:hover{transform:translateY(-4px); box-shadow:0 18px 40px rgba(20,40,10,0.10);}
.vcard-body{padding:26px 24px 30px;}
.vcard-body h3{font-size:1.15rem;}
.vcard-body p{margin-top:8px; font-size:0.92rem;}
.vcard-body a{margin-top:16px; display:inline-block; font-weight:700; color:var(--green-dark); font-size:0.88rem;}

/* ---------- HERO (sub-pages) ---------- */
.page-hero{border-bottom:1px solid var(--line); padding:64px 0 56px;}
.page-hero h1{max-width:760px;}
.page-hero .lede{margin-top:18px;}
.breadcrumb{font-size:0.78rem; color:var(--ink-soft); margin-bottom:22px;}
.breadcrumb a{border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);}

/* ---------- Icon ---------- */
.icon{width:38px; height:38px; flex-shrink:0;}
.icon svg{width:100%; height:100%; stroke:var(--green-dark); fill:none; stroke-width:1.4; stroke-linecap:round; stroke-linejoin:round;}

/* ---------- Feature / service rows ---------- */
.row-list{border-top:1px solid var(--ink); margin-top:8px;}
.row-item{
  display:grid; grid-template-columns:64px 1fr; gap:22px; padding:30px 0; border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);
}
.row-thumb{
  width:64px; height:64px; border-radius:14px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; flex-shrink:0;
}
.row-thumb svg{width:28px; height:28px; stroke:#fff; fill:none; stroke-width:1.5; stroke-linecap:round; stroke-linejoin:round;}
.row-item h3{margin-bottom:8px;}
.row-item p{max-width:620px;}
@media(max-width:600px){ .row-item{grid-template-columns:34px 1fr;} }

/* ---------- Card grid ---------- */
.card-grid{display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr); gap:1px; background:var(--line); border:1px solid var(--line);}
@media(max-width:860px){ .card-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;} }
.card{background:var(--paper); padding:36px 30px;}
.card h3{margin-bottom:10px;}
.card p{font-size:0.92rem;}
.card a.arrow-link{margin-top:16px; display:inline-block;}

/* ---------- Two column ---------- */
.two-col{display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:56px; align-items:start;}
@media(max-width:820px){ .two-col{grid-template-columns:1fr; gap:32px;} }

/* ---------- Stat strip ---------- */
.stat-strip{display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr); gap:24px; border-top:1px solid var(--ink); padding-top:24px; margin-top:40px;}
@media(max-width:700px){ .stat-strip{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);} }
.stat strong{display:block; font-size:1.8rem; font-weight:500;}
.stat span{font-size:0.78rem; color:var(--ink-soft);}

/* ---------- Band (tinted section) ---------- */
.band{background:#f0f2ea; border-top:1px solid var(--line); border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);}

/* ---------- FAQ ---------- */
.faq-item{border-bottom:1px solid var(--line); padding:22px 0;}
.faq-item h3{font-size:1rem; margin-bottom:8px;}
.faq-item p{font-size:0.92rem;}

/* ---------- Areas served list ---------- */
.area-list{display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:10px; margin-top:20px;}
.area-list span{font-size:0.82rem; border:1px solid var(--line); padding:7px 14px; color:var(--ink-soft);}

/* ---------- CTA band ---------- */
.cta-band{background:var(--ink); color:#efece2; text-align:center;}
.cta-band h2{color:#fff;}
.cta-band p{color:#bdb9ab; max-width:520px; margin:16px auto 0;}
.cta-band .btn{margin-top:28px; background:var(--green); }
.cta-band .btn:hover{background:#4fa825;}

/* ---------- Contact ---------- */
dl.info{margin-top:8px;}
.info-row{display:grid; grid-template-columns:110px 1fr; gap:16px; padding:16px 0; border-top:1px solid var(--line);}
.info-row:first-child{border-top:none;}
.info-row dt{font-size:0.72rem; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--ink-soft);}
.info-row dd a{border-bottom:1px solid var(--green);}

.reg-list{display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:28px; margin-top:22px;}
.reg-item dt{color:var(--ink-soft); font-size:0.7rem; letter-spacing:0.08em; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:4px;}
.reg-item dd{font-weight:600; font-size:0.92rem;}

/* ---------- Footer ---------- */
footer{border-top:1px solid var(--line); padding:52px 0 26px;}
.footer-grid{display:grid; grid-template-columns:1.4fr 1fr 1fr 1fr; gap:36px; margin-bottom:36px;}
@media(max-width:760px){ .footer-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:28px;} }
footer h4{font-size:0.72rem; letter-spacing:0.1em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--ink-soft); margin-bottom:14px;}
footer p{font-size:0.86rem; max-width:280px;}
footer ul{display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:9px; font-size:0.86rem;}
footer a:hover{color:var(--green-dark);}
.footer-bottom{border-top:1px solid var(--line); padding-top:20px; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:10px; font-size:0.76rem; color:var(--ink-soft);}
</style>

<script type="application/ld+json">
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "ProfessionalService",
  "name": "Mosadia Mmakgonthe (Pty) Ltd",
  "image": "https://www.mosadiammakgonthe.co.za/data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  "url": "https://www.mosadiammakgonthe.co.za/",
  "telephone": "+27720421130",
  "email": "charmyben@gmail.com",
  "description": "Professional cleaning services, pest control services and hygiene management services based in Polokwane, Limpopo, South Africa.",
  "address": {
    "@type": "PostalAddress",
    "streetAddress": "293 Marshall Street, Florapark",
    "addressLocality": "Polokwane",
    "addressRegion": "Limpopo",
    "addressCountry": "ZA"
  },
  "areaServed": { "@type": "State", "name": "Limpopo" },
  "founder": { "@type": "Person", "name": "Motlalepula Charmaine Honwana" },
  "foundingDate": "2015",
  "slogan": "Cleaner Spaces. Safer Places. Every Time.",
  "hasOfferCatalog": {
    "@type": "OfferCatalog",
    "name": "Services",
    "itemListElement": [
      { "@type": "Offer", "itemOffered": { "@type": "Service", "name": "Commercial Cleaning Services" } },
      { "@type": "Offer", "itemOffered": { "@type": "Service", "name": "Office Cleaning Services" } },
      { "@type": "Offer", "itemOffered": { "@type": "Service", "name": "Deep Cleaning Services" } },
      { "@type": "Offer", "itemOffered": { "@type": "Service", "name": "Termite Control" } },
      { "@type": "Offer", "itemOffered": { "@type": "Service", "name": "Rodent Control" } },
      { "@type": "Offer", "itemOffered": { "@type": "Service", "name": "Fumigation Services" } },
      { "@type": "Offer", "itemOffered": { "@type": "Service", "name": "Hygiene Management Services" } }
    ]
  }
}
</script>
</head>
<body>
<a class="skip-link" href="#main">Skip to content</a>

<header class="home-header">
  <div class="home-nav">
    <a class="brand" href="preview_index.html" aria-label="Mosadia Mmakgonthe home">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Mosadia Mmakgonthe logo">
    </a>
    <nav class="navlinks" aria-label="Primary">
      <a href="preview_cleaning-services.html">Cleaning Service</a>
      <a href="preview_pest-control.html">Pest Control</a>
      <a href="preview_hygiene-management.html">Hygiene Management</a>
      <a href="preview_about.html">About Us</a>
      <a href="preview_contact.html">Contact Us</a>
    </nav>
    <div class="nav-right">
      <a class="pill-phone" href="tel:+27720421130">072 042 1130</a>
      <div class="social-mini">
        <a href="mailto:charmyben@gmail.com" aria-label="Email us">
          <svg width="15" height="15" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M4 4h16v16H4z"/><path d="m4 4 8 8 8-8"/></svg>
        </a>
        <a href="https://instagram.com" aria-label="Instagram" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
          <svg width="15" height="15" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="3" y="3" width="18" height="18" rx="5"/><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="4"/></svg>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</header>

<main id="main">

<div class="hero-photo-wrap">
  <div class="hero-photo-frame">
    <div class="hero-photo-content">
      <a class="hero-estimate-pill" href="preview_contact.html">Request an Estimate</a>
      <h1 class="hero-big">We Clean.<br>You <em>Breathe Easy.</em></h1>
      <p class="lede">Spotless offices. Pest-free homes. Hygienic workplaces. Mosadia Mmakgonthe brings dependable, detail-driven cleaning, pest control and hygiene management to Polokwane and every corner of Limpopo.</p>
      <div class="hero-cta-row">
        <a class="btn-lime" href="preview_contact.html">Get Your Free Quote</a>
        <a class="btn-ghost-white" href="preview_cleaning-services.html">Explore Our Services</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="county-band">Servicing: Polokwane &amp; Greater Limpopo Province</div>
</div>

<section style="padding-top:80px;">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="kicker">Why Homes &amp; Businesses Choose Us</div>
    <h2 style="max-width:640px;">Clean isn't just how it looks. It's how it feels.</h2>
    <p class="lede" style="margin-top:16px;">Founded in 2015 by Motlalepula Charmaine Honwana, and grounded in a mentorship heritage dating back to 1992, Mosadia Mmakgonthe is a registered cleaning company and pest control contractor built for schools, hospitals, hotels, offices and homes that expect more than "good enough."</p>
    <div class="stat-strip">
      <div class="stat"><strong>2015</strong><span>Cleaning company established</span></div>
      <div class="stat"><strong>1992</strong><span>Heritage of our mentoring enterprise</span></div>
      <div class="stat"><strong>3</strong><span>Integrated service divisions</span></div>
      <div class="stat"><strong>Limpopo</strong><span>Province-wide service area</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="band">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="kicker">What We Do</div>
    <h2 style="margin-bottom:44px; max-width:600px;">Three services. One team you can trust with your space.</h2>
    <div class="vibrant-cards">
      <article class="vcard">
        <div class="photo-panel ppa">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M9 3v4M15 3v4M4 9h16l-1.5 11a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H7.5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2L4 9Z"/></svg>
          <span class="panel-label">Cleaning Services</span>
        </div>
        <div class="vcard-body">
          <h3>Professional Cleaning Services</h3>
          <p>From spotless offices to deep-cleaned kitchens — commercial, residential and industrial cleaning that leaves every surface truly clean.</p>
          <a href="preview_cleaning-services.html">See Cleaning Services →</a>
        </div>
      </article>
      <article class="vcard">
        <div class="photo-panel ppb">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M12 2 4 6v6c0 5 3.4 8.7 8 10 4.6-1.3 8-5 8-10V6l-8-4Z M9 12l2 2 4-4"/></svg>
          <span class="panel-label">Pest Control</span>
        </div>
        <div class="vcard-body">
          <h3>Pest Control Services</h3>
          <p>Termites, rodents, roaches, bed bugs, ants and mosquitoes — treated at the source, so they don't come back.</p>
          <a href="preview_pest-control.html">See Pest Control →</a>
        </div>
      </article>
      <article class="vcard">
        <div class="photo-panel ppc">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M12 21s-7-4.6-9.2-9.2C1.4 8 3 4.8 6.2 4.2c2-.4 3.7.6 5 2.3 1.1-1.7 3-2.7 5-2.3 3.2.6 4.8 3.8 3.4 7.6C18.2 16.4 12 21 12 21z"/></svg>
          <span class="panel-label">Hygiene Management</span>
        </div>
        <div class="vcard-body">
          <h3>Hygiene Management Services</h3>
          <p>Disinfection, sanitization and washroom hygiene programmes that keep your people healthy and your facility compliant.</p>
          <a href="preview_hygiene-management.html">See Hygiene Solutions →</a>
        </div>
      </article>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section>
  <div class="wrap two-col">
    <div>
      <div class="kicker">Areas We Serve</div>
      <h2 style="font-size:1.7rem;">Local, reliable, and ready when you need us</h2>
      <p class="lede" style="margin-top:14px; font-size:0.98rem;">Proudly based in Polokwane, we serve homes, offices, schools, hospitals and industrial sites across Limpopo — the cleaning and pest control company your neighbours already trust.</p>
      <div class="area-list">
        <span>Polokwane</span><span>Offices</span><span>Schools</span><span>Hospitals</span><span>Hotels</span><span>Industrial Sites</span><span>Residential Homes</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div>
      <div class="kicker">Registered &amp; Compliant</div>
      <h2 style="font-size:1.7rem;">Verified for your peace of mind</h2>
      <dl class="reg-list">
        <div class="reg-item"><dt>CK Number</dt><dd>2015/184694/07</dd></div>
        <div class="reg-item"><dt>Founded</dt><dd>2015, Polokwane, Limpopo</dd></div>
        <div class="reg-item"><dt>Approach</dt><dd>Environmentally-conscious methods</dd></div>
      </dl>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="cta-band">
  <div class="wrap">
    <h2>Ready for a space that finally feels clean?</h2>
    <p>Tell us about your site and we'll put together an affordable, effective plan — for a single visit or an ongoing contract.</p>
    <a class="btn" href="preview_contact.html">Get Your Free Quote</a>
  </div>
</section>

</main>

<a class="chat-bubble" href="https://wa.me/27720421130" target="_blank" rel="noopener" aria-label="Chat with us on WhatsApp">
  <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M21 11.5a8.5 8.5 0 0 1-12.36 7.56L4 20l1.06-4.46A8.5 8.5 0 1 1 21 11.5Z"/></svg>
  Let's Chat!
</a>

<footer>
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="footer-grid">
      <div>
        <span class="brand-text"><span class="name">Mosadia Mmakgonthe</span></span>
        <p style="margin-top:12px;">Professional cleaning services, pest control services and hygiene management services in Polokwane, Limpopo. CK 2015/184694/07.</p>
      </div>

          <li><a href="tel:+27720421130">072 042 1130</a></li>

      <span>© <span id="year"></span> Mosadia Mmakgonthe (Pty) Ltd. All rights reserved.</span>
      <span>Cleaner Spaces. Safer Places. Every Time.</span>
    </div>

</footer>
<script>document.getElementById('year').textContent = new Date().getFullYear();</script>
</body>
